product_overview: TributeiClass is a SaaS platform designed to help retailers, accountants, and tax analysts navigate and comply with Brazil's tax reform (IBS and CBS). It offers quick, accurate product tax inquiries via EAN, NCM, name, or product photo using AI vision and provides clear financial impact insights, tax benefits, and optimization guidance.
core_goals: Provide clarity on complex Brazilian tax reform legislation by translating it into actionable insights for retailers.
Enable multi-channel product tax lookups including barcode scanning, textual search, and AI-powered image recognition.
Leverage AI to simplify tax regulation explanations tailored for business understanding.
Simulate and compare current versus new tax burdens to aid financial planning and pricing decisions.
Support secure user authentication and role-based access controls.
Offer tiered subscription plans with seamless payment integration and management.
Provide administrative tools to manage users, organizations, and the product database effectively.
key_features: User authentication and account management with Supabase Auth (signup, login, password reset, profile management, roles admin/user).
Product search engine allowing lookup by EAN, NCM, product name, with fuzzy and cascade search strategies.
AI-powered barcode extraction from uploaded product photos using Google Gemini Vision.
Tax calculation engine applying IBS and CBS rates, identifying reductions and split payments, with financial impact simulation comparing old and new tax systems.
Generative AI assistant providing simplified, contextual tax insights and explanations.
Subscription plans integrated with Stripe for checkout, upgrade, downgrade, and cancellation.
User dashboard with recent search history and subscription status summary.
Admin dashboard for managing users, organizations, subscriptions, and product database.
user_flow_summary: User logs in or signs up and gains access to the dashboard.
User searches for products by EAN barcode, product name, or NCM code; the system performs a cascaded search prioritizing EAN, fallback to name or NCM with validation.
The tax service calculates IBS and CBS taxes, applies reductions, and simulates financial impact compared to the old tax scenario.
AI Insights generate simplified tax explanations related to the query to enhance user understanding.
Subscription flow includes selecting plans, Stripe checkout, and post-purchase activation of subscription and feature limits.
Admin users oversee user and organization management and monitor platform usage through a dedicated admin dashboard.
validation_criteria: Authentication flows must securely create, access, and recover user accounts with appropriate role restrictions.
Product searches return accurate results within 2 seconds, including fuzzy and cascaded logic.
Tax calculations for IBS and CBS must reflect current legislation rules and correctly apply reductions and split payments.
AI-generated insights are contextually relevant, accurate, and generated within acceptable response times (~3-5 seconds).
Subscription and payment processing via Stripe must handle all payment states and updates reliably.
User dashboards reflect correct subscription status, query history, and usage limits.
Admin dashboard provides accurate, real-time management of users, organizations, and product data.
System UI is mobile-first, responsive, secure, and meets performance benchmarks.

features.name: Authentication
features.description: User login, signup, password reset, and session management using Supabase Auth.

features.name: Product Search & Tax Engine
features.description: Search products by EAN, NCM, or Name, and calculate IBS/CBS taxes with comparative analysis.

features.name: AI Insights (Gemini)
features.description: Generates simplified tax explanations and processes images for barcode extraction.

features.name: Subscription & Payments
features.description: Pricing plans, Stripe checkout integration, and organization management.

features.name: Admin Dashboard
features.description: Backoffice for managing users, organizations, and products.
